_comment: gosec finding baseline (v8.2.0–v8.4.0 update, 2026-05-19). CI fails when the live count exceeds the baseline total — i.e. on net-new findings. To accept a NEW finding: review it, update docs/security-review.md, then bump total + by_rule. Notes: G115 (integer overflow) fully resolved in v8.x. G122 filepath.Walk TOCTOU in scan/plugin walkers — accepted, daemon runs as operator user, not multi-tenant. G702 command injection taint FP in voice transcription + identity CLI (inputs are operator-controlled). G703 path traversal taint analysis FP — all flagged callsites have explicit checkPathTraversal or filepath.Clean guards. G704 SSRF taint FP — all flagged URLs come from operator-configured federation peers, compute nodes, or proxy targets. G118/G123 goroutine/context handling — accepted pattern in long-running daemon.
